channel.title: The International Journal of Biostatistics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in The International Journal of Biostatistics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Li-Chu Chien DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijb-2024-frontmatter2
